'''Manaan: Depths of History''' was a series of ''[[Planet Hoppers]]'' articles published by [[Wizards of the Coast]], detailing the planet [[Manaan/Legends|Manaan]]. It was written by [[Cory J. Herndon]] and published on [[Wizards.com]] in [[February]] [[2004]].

==Contents==
===Part 1: Backwater===
''…an unimpressed visitor details why she won't be returning to Manaan's [[Ahto Luxury Resorts]].''<ref name="Manaan" />

===Part 2: Whatever Happened to the Selkath?===
''…a poorly researched tourist's guide describes the history of [[Manaan/Legends|Manaan]] and its people.''<ref name="Manaan" />

===Part 3: The Order of Shasa===
''…a young [[Selkath/Legends|Selkath]] leaves his menial job to join a secret sect of Selkath [[Force Adept|Force adepts]].''<ref name="Manaan" />

===Part 4: Blades of Rebellion===
''…the [[Order of Shasa]] lead an uprising against the Imperial occupation.''<ref name="Manaan" />
